---
title: "Merge df of resistance and sample size"
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
source("R/config.R")
source("R/utils.R")
source("R/data_loader.R")
source("R/analysis.R")
config <- get_config()
```

```{r merge}
df_combined <- merge_resistance_data(config)
```

```{r summary}
cat("Merged", nrow(df_combined), "rows across", ncol(df_combined), "columns.\n")
cat("Farmers:", length(unique(df_combined$Farmer_Agronomist)), "\n")
cat("Output:", file.path(config$data_dir, "combined_dataframe.csv"), "\n")
```
